hero.title_line1: Full-Stack Web Developer in Morocco, Fast Websites
hero.description: I'm a full-stack web developer in Morocco, helping enterprises, startups, and individual persons build modern, high-performance websites, improve their SEO rankings, and automate workflows using AI tools. I also design high-converting social media ads.
hero.focus: My focus is simple: performance, scalability, and real results for growing businesses.
hero.profile_role: Full-Stack Developer, SEO Specialist & AI Automation
hero.mission: My mission is to assist startups and enterprises in creating an emotional bond between their products and satisfied, engaged customers.

about_section.subtitle: Your partner for
about_section.paragraph1: I’m a developer and designer with experience building modern digital solutions. I’ve participated in several hackathons, winning 1st place at Al Akhawayn University and UM6P Ben Guerir, and 2nd place at UM6P Rabat, along with participating in other hackathons. I’ve also worked on projects for clients in Morocco, helping them build websites, automate business processes, and create social media ads that convert.
about_section.paragraph2: Through working on real projects and competing in hackathons, I’ve gained valuable experience that I now focus on using to create high-quality websites, business systems, and digital solutions.

why_we_are_section.description: I help businesses, startups, and individuals build powerful digital solutions that don’t just look good they perform, convert, and scale. Every project is designed to deliver real results and long-term value.
why_we_are_section.subtitle: What makes me the right partner for your success

services_page.title: Services
services_page.subtitle: Services We Provide
services_page.heading: Expert Web Development, SEO & Custom AI Automation in Morocco
services_page.description: Looking for professional web development, SEO optimization, or AI automation services in Morocco? We build SEO-optimized websites, create AI-powered business automation systems, and design high-converting social media ads. Trusted by startups and enterprises to deliver measurable results, increase online visibility, and drive sales growth.

web.title: Secure & SEO-Optimized Website Development
web.subtitle: Websites built to rank, convert, and scale
web.description: Build fast websites with modern technologies, focusing on performance, security, mobile-first design, and search engine optimization to help your business rank higher and convert visitors into clients.
web.longDescription: Every website we build starts with a clear goal: get found, get clicks, and turn visitors into paying clients. We combine modern frameworks like Next.js with proven SEO architecture, clean code, and mobile-first design to deliver a site that works as hard as you do.

benefits.title: Higher search rankings
benefits.text: Structured data, optimized meta, fast load times, everything Google rewards.

benefits.title: More conversions
benefits.text: Clear CTAs, intuitive layouts, and trust signals that turn visitors into leads.

benefits.title: Performance Insights
benefits.text: Track traffic, user behavior, and search performance using Google Analytics and Search Console.

process.title: Discovery
process.text: We learn your goals, audience, and competitors.

process.title: Design, Build & Test
process.text: Wireframes, development, SEO setup, and thorough analysis & testing for performance and security.

process.title: Launch & Monitor
process.text: Go live with analytics, sitemap, and performance checks.

systems.title: Business Automation & AI-Powered Systems
systems.subtitle: Stop doing manually what a system can do for you
systems.description: Custom software tools, automated workflows, and AI integrations that simplify operations, reduce repetitive tasks, and help your business run faster and more efficiently.
systems.longDescription: We build custom dashboards, automated pipelines, and AI-powered tools tailored to your exact workflow. Whether it's client management, inventory tracking, or intelligent reporting — you get a system that works the way your business does.

benefits.title: Save hours every week
benefits.text: Automate repetitive tasks so your team focuses on what matters.

benefits.title: Fewer errors
benefits.text: Automated systems eliminate manual data entry mistakes.

benefits.title: Real-time insights
benefits.text: Custom dashboards that show the numbers you actually need.

process.title: Audit
process.text: We map your current workflow and find automation opportunities.

process.title: Build
process.text: Custom tools and integrations built around your stack.

process.title: Train & Hand off
process.text: Full documentation and walkthrough so your team is confident.

design.title: Social Media Ad Design
design.subtitle: Visuals that stop the scroll and drive action
design.description: Professional ad visuals for Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok designed to clearly present your products or services, attract attention, and increase engagement and sales.
design.longDescription: Great ads don't just look good — they communicate the right message at the right moment. We design scroll-stopping visuals with clear messaging, strong CTAs, and brand consistency that makes your products impossible to ignore.

benefits.title: More engagement
benefits.text: Eye-catching designs that earn saves, shares, and clicks.

benefits.title: Brand consistency
benefits.text: Every visual feels unmistakably yours across every platform.

benefits.title: Higher ROAS
benefits.text: Creatives built around conversion, not just aesthetics.

process.title: Brief
process.text: We define your audience, platform, and campaign goal.

process.title: Design
process.text: Multiple concepts delivered with revisions included.

process.title: Export & Launch
process.text: Delivered in all sizes and formats ready to run.

about_page.title: About Me
about_page.heading: Developer & designer focused on real results
about_page.intro: I'm a freelance full-stack developer and designer using modern technologies. I help startups, enterprises, and individuals build high-performance websites, improve SEO, automate workflows with AI, and design high-converting social media ads.

whoIAm.title: Who I Am
whoIAm.paragraph1: I'm Mohammed, a full-stack developer, SEO specialist, and designer passionate about turning ideas into high-performing digital products. I hold a diploma in Digital Full-Stack Development from ISTA and a diploma in Architecte en Technologies du Numérique from 1337, part of the prestigious 42 Network. I also have certifications in web development, digital marketing, and AI. I actively participate in hackathons and speak at tech community events to gain experience and stay updated with the latest technologies.
whoIAm.paragraph2: I believe in clean code, clear communication, and measurable results. I'm committed to helping you succeed online with solutions that work because your success is my success.

experience.title: My Experience & Background
experience.paragraph: I've worked with enterprises, startups, and small businesses to build real digital solutions that deliver results. I've developed full-stack web applications, configured servers for optimal performance, and built automation systems that save hours of manual work daily. I've designed hundreds of social media ad visuals that helped businesses increase engagement and sales. I've also won first place in multiple hackathons I participated in, competing against talented developers and building innovative solutions under pressure. From setting up SEO-friendly architectures to deploying AI-powered workflows, every project I take on is focused on one thing: getting you measurable outcomes.

storyMissionValues.title: Discover the story, mission, and values that drive me
storyMissionValues.story: My journey started with a curiosity for how the web works and how businesses can use it to grow. Over the years I've built websites, automated processes, and designed campaigns for brands that needed a partner who could both code and design and deliver on time.
storyMissionValues.mission: My mission is to help businesses and creators build a strong, visible online presence. I want every project to be fast, findable, and focused on the user so you can focus on what you do best while your digital presence works for you.
values: Quality over quantity — every line of code and every pixel matters.
Transparency — you're always in the loop, from kickoff to launch.
Performance — lightweight, SEO-friendly, and built to last.
Partnership — I succeed when your business grows.

portfolio_page.subtitle: Selected Work
portfolio_page.heading: Work That Moves Businesses Forward
portfolio_page.description: From fast-loading websites to intelligent automations, here's a curated look at what I've built, launched, and delivered for real clients and personal ventures. Let's add your project to this list.

ui.ctaTitle: Got a project idea? Let's make it happen.
ui.ctaDescription: I partner with businesses and founders to design, build, and launch digital products that perform. Whether you're starting from scratch or leveling up — I'm ready when you are.

projects.title: Corporate Website & SEO Growth
projects.description: Designed and developed a professional company website to showcase services and products with a strong focus on performance and SEO. Achieved over 2,900 new users in just 2 months thanks to fast loading speeds, optimized structure, and modern technologies.

projects.title: Business Automation Dashboard
projects.description: Built a custom dashboard to manage clients, subscriptions, and business operations in one place. Features include tracking subscription start/end dates, pricing, stock management, and automated alerts for expired services.

projects.title: Social Media Design & Ads
projects.description: Created high-converting social media visuals by transforming simple product images into professional marketing content. Each design includes clear messaging, branding, and CTA elements to increase engagement.

projects.title: Open Source CLI Toolkit
projects.description: Built a reusable command-line toolkit that automates repetitive development tasks and improves team productivity. Includes modular commands, configuration support, and clear documentation for onboarding.

projects.title: Academic Research Portal
projects.description: Designed and implemented a university portal prototype for managing research submissions, supervisor feedback, and project status tracking. Focused on usability, data structure, and accessible interface patterns.

portfolio_page.Warning: The professional projects are published with authorization. Additional projects are not included here to respect privacy.
